task: Pivot Step 3: Best-first proof search (Path C) vs MCTS baseline on gate3_v2
method: Best-first search with contrastive lemma embeddings (Path C encoder)

search_config.verify_permissive: Accepts rewrite/intro/cases with unsolved goals as valid steps

mcts_baseline.note: MCTS never achieved multi-step proofs. All successes were single-tactic simp.

comparison_summary.note: Best-first search achieves 2 multi-step proofs (rw[h]; ring) vs 0 for MCTS. Target 'multi-step proofs > 0' achieved.

key_innovations: Contrastive lemma scoring with normalized scores capped below structural tactics
Permissive verification: accept rewrite/intro with unsolved goals as valid intermediate steps
Terminal state verification: reject symbolically-complete but Lean-invalid states
Priority queue: structural tactics (rw=0.75, ring=0.70) prioritized above lemma actions (max 0.65)
One-at-a-time verification to avoid BatchChecker process pool crashes
